name: English
bot_added_group: Bot has been added to this group. 👋
features_list: 🏰 Alliance Management • Create alliances and bind groups • Multi-alliance support 👥 Member Management • Auto member tracking (Furnace, Name, State) • Bulk add/remove members • Change notifications 🎁 Gift Code System • Automatic code redemption • New code checking (5 min interval) • Detailed error reports 📅 Attendance System • Event participation tracking • Attendance reports 🔔 Event Reminders • Automatic event notifications • Custom time settings
add_bot_to_group: 📌 To add bot to a group:
add_bot_button: Click the button below or manually add the bot to your group.
admin_notice: ⚠️ Note: Only admins can use bot commands.
help_text: 📚 WhiteBot Command Guide ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 🚀 General /start - Start the bot /help - Show this help /setup - Setup wizard /panel - Admin control panel /language - Change your personal language /setgrouplang - Change group language /premium - Subscription and limits /support - Contact support /changelog - Bot version and updates 👤 Account Management /register - Register game account /delete - Delete registered account /profile - View profile /history - Player change history /checkuser [FID] - Check user by FID 🏰 Alliance Management /alliance - Alliance info /setupalliance - Create alliance in group /alliancetag - Change alliance tag /alliancename - Change alliance name /setgroup - Link group to alliance /getlinkcode - Discord link code /unlinkdiscord - Remove Discord link 👥 Member Management /removemember [FID] - Remove member /members - View members /bulkremove - Bulk remove members 🎁 Gift Codes /codes - Gift code list /usecode [CODE] - Use code for all members /codestats - Gift code statistics 🔄 Transfer & Game Info /transfer [state] - Kingdom transfer info /state - Server timeline and events /calc - Game calculators /hero - Hero guide and tier list 📅 Events & Attendance /events - View events /addevent - Add event /attendance - Attendance tracking /changes - Recent changes ⚙️ Control & Tracking /startcontrol - Start auto tracking /stopcontrol - Stop auto tracking /setinterval - Set check interval 🗺️ Map /mapsetup - Map manager /setcoord - Set your position on map 📋 Google Forms /addform - Add auto-fill form /forms - List saved forms ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 💡 Owner commands: /help owner

add_alliance_help: To add a new alliance: /addalliance [TAG] [Name] Example: /addalliance ABC My Alliance

view_codes_help: To view all codes: /codes To check code status: /giftcodestatus
start_control_help: To start auto control: /startcontrol To stop: /stopcontrol To set interval: /setinterval [minutes]
view_settings_help: To view current settings: /settings To set log channel: /setlogchannel

welcome_desc: Send automatic welcome messages to new members
send_welcome_message: Send the welcome message you want to use:
welcome_register_desc:
Register to receive automatic gift codes:

**1️⃣** In game, tap your Avatar
**2️⃣** Press Settings (⚙️) button
**3️⃣** Copy your FID number
**4️⃣** Type here: `/register FID`
welcome_footer: ✨ After registration, all gift codes will be automatically applied!
welcome_tg_greeting:
👋 Welcome {user}!

🏰 You joined **[{tag}] {name}**.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
📝 **Register & Get Gift Codes!**
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

To receive automatic gift codes, you need to register:

**How to register?**
1️⃣ In game, tap your **Avatar**
2️⃣ Press **Settings** (⚙️) button
3️⃣ Copy your **FID** number
4️⃣ Type here: `/register YOUR_FID`

**Example:** `/register 123456789`

✨ After registration, all gift codes will be automatically applied to your account!
invite_discord_desc: Click the button below to add the bot to your Discord server.
discord_tip: Use /setgroup [TAG] in Discord to link the channel to alliance.

setpremium_on_desc: 🟢 ON — Users can see premium plans, prices and upgrade options.
setpremium_off_desc: 🔴 OFF — Users only see 'contact owner' message (no prices shown).
setpremium_when_on: When ON: /premium shows plans, prices, comparison table, upgrade buttons.
setpremium_when_off: When OFF: /premium shows usage limits only + 'contact owner' button. No prices or plans visible to users.
setpremium_assignplan_note: Owner can still assign plans manually with /assignplan in both modes.
setpremium_invalid_arg: ❌ Invalid argument. Use: /setpremium on or /setpremium off
setpremium_already_on: ℹ️ Premium visibility is already ON.
setpremium_already_off: ℹ️ Premium visibility is already OFF.
setpremium_turned_on: ✅ Premium visibility: ON Users will now see plan comparison, prices and upgrade options in /premium.
setpremium_turned_off: ✅ Premium visibility: OFF Users will only see their current usage limits and a 'contact owner' button. No plan names, prices or upgrade buttons will be shown. You can still assign plans manually with /assignplan.
invalid_state_id: Invalid State ID. Please enter numbers only.
note_initial_heroes: Information about Generations for each day is now available. The list of Heroes will keep growing over time. There's a lot to do and only two hands to handle it 😉
note_arena_update: Opponent pool enlarged by nearby servers.
note_sunfire_castle: Sunfire Castle becomes the battleground for state alliances. Following the election of a President, ministers can be appointed. The Sunfire Castle Battle happens on Saturday.
note_fire_crystal_1_3: Fire Crystal 1-3: Completion of the 'Road to Discovery' Monument unlocks the Fire Crystal Age, granting players at Furnace level 30 the ability to enhance their buildings further.
note_svs_koi: The events run on separate timelines. If your server is below day 80 (12 weeks) when they begin, you'll experience another HOC.
note_crystal_4_5: Fire Crystal 4-5 and Crystal laboratory unlock
note_legendary_gear: Chief Legendary Gear Unlock - try our Chief Gear Calculator.
note_war_academy: War Academy, Fire Crystal Tech and T11 Troops Unlock
note_advanced_crystal: Fire Crystal Building level 6-8 and Refined Fire Crystal Unlock
broadcast_enter_message:
Type the message you want to send.
It will be delivered to all groups and users.
broadcast_tip: The message will be automatically translated to each group's language.
broadcast_ai_note: Message will be auto-translated to each group's language via AI.
history_no_records: No change records found for this player.

transfer_not_in_any_group: This state is not in any transfer group!
transfer_not_eligible_desc: Your state is not included in the transfer group for the following dates
state_not_in_schedule: State not found in transfer schedule!
state_too_new_or_invalid: This state is too new or invalid. It's not yet included in the transfer schedule.
transfer_schedule_info: Transfer schedule typically includes states at least 100 days old.
transfer_cost_desc: Transfer Score = Furnace + Gear + Hero + Pet + Expert power (Troop power excluded)
transfer_req_power_cap: Must not exceed the Power Cap
transfer_req_furnace: Must reach required Furnace level (varies with state age)
transfer_req_no_alliance: Must not be in any Alliance
transfer_req_no_combat: City must not be in combat
transfer_req_same_gen: Target state must have same Hero Gen and FC level
transfer_req_max_chars: Fewer than 4 characters in target state
transfer_phase1: Phase 1: Pre-Transfer (3 days) — Power caps are set
transfer_phase2: Phase 2: Invitational Transfer (2 days) — President sends invites
transfer_phase3: Phase 3: Open Transfer (2 days) — Everyone can transfer
transfer_alliance_only: Transfer command only works in alliance groups
transfer_use_in_group: Use this command in your alliance group
transfer_no_alliance: This group is not linked to an alliance
transfer_alliance_suspended_desc: This alliance has been suspended. Your bot permissions are restricted.
transfer_not_member: You are not a member of this alliance
cj_main_desc: Crazy Joe event guide — wave info, point calculator and difficulty recommendation.
cj_difficulty_desc: Higher level = more enemies but more points.
cj_warning_online: ⚠️ ALL MEMBERS must be online for this wave!
cj_warning_hq: 🏰 HQ Defense — send reinforcements! No self-def points.
cj_points_tip: Higher level = more points but stronger enemies.
cj_recommend_tip: This is an estimate. Adjust based on your alliance strength.
cj_no_members: No registered members found in this alliance.
cj_no_alliance: Alliance not found. Use this in an alliance group.
addevent_usage: 📅 Add Event Notification Usage: /addevent [type] [HH:MM] [timezone] [description] {event_types} {event_list} Example: /addevent bear_trap 12:00 UTC Bear Trap starting! Timezones: UTC, Europe/Istanbul, America/New_York, etc.
eventrepeat_usage: 📅 Set Event Repeat Schedule Usage: /eventrepeat [ID] [days] Examples: • /eventrepeat 1 daily - Every day • /eventrepeat 1 mon,wed,fri - Specific days • /eventrepeat 1 off - Disable repeat Days: mon, tue, wed, thu, fri, sat, sun
eventmention_usage: 📢 Set Event Mention Usage: /eventmention [ID] [type] Types: • none - No mention • everyone - @everyone • here - @here (Discord only)
transfer_update_desc: Official transfer dates have been updated!
transfer_update_check: Use /transfer [state] to see your transfer details.
transfer_update_affected: New transfer dates have been announced that include your state!
transfer_tracker_checking: Checking for new transfer sneak peeks
transfer_tracker_no_new: No new transfer sneak peeks found.
bulkadd_disabled: 🚫 The /bulkadd command has been disabled. Please use /addmember to add members one by one.
bulkadd_hint: Paste FIDs separated by spaces or commas. No TAG needed — alliance is auto-detected from group.
bulkadd_truncated: ⚠️ Limit reached! Only first {limit} will be processed.
bear_trap_tip:
If you don't have the correct heroes, send troops with NO heroes.
It's better to send no heroes than wrong heroes.
bear_trap_recall: 🚨 Remember to RECALL your troops before Bear Trap starts!
canyon_tip: Focus on rally damage. Send your strongest heroes.
foundry_tip: Coordinate with alliance for best results.
crazy_joe_tip: Use the Crazy Joe calculator (/calc) for difficulty recommendation.
fortress_tip: Defend your fortress and send reinforcements to allies.

Share this link with alliance members.
They can view the map but cannot edit it.

hero_bt_tip3: Higher gen heroes generally outperform lower gen

yt_welcome_desc: You have been selected as a YouTuber partner by WOS Control.
yt_welcome_page: Your channel is now listed on our YouTubers page:
yt_welcome_promo_info: When you publish a video with 'woscontrol' in the title or description, you'll be automatically featured on our page!
yt_welcome_how_to_featured: 1️⃣ Publish a YouTube video about Whiteout Survival 2️⃣ Include the word woscontrol in the video title or description 3️⃣ Our system automatically detects it and promotes you to ⭐ Featured! 💡 Example title: "Best WOS Tips — woscontrol.com"
yt_welcome_featured_reward: ⭐ Featured status lasts 7 days and renews with each new promotion video.
yt_welcome_contact: If you have questions, contact us:
yt_promo_thanks_desc: Thank you for your WOS Control promotion video!
yt_promo_thanks_featured: You are now ⭐ Featured on our YouTubers page!
yt_promo_thanks_duration:
This featured status will last 7 days.
It renews with each new woscontrol video.
yt_add_ask_url:
Send the YouTube channel URL or @handle.
Channel info will be auto-fetched via YouTube Data API v3.
yt_add_fetching: Fetching channel info from YouTube API...
yt_add_not_found: YouTube channel not found. Check the URL or handle.
yt_add_tg_instruction: Send the YouTuber's Telegram user ID (numeric). ⚠️ This person must have started the bot (/start) before. 💡 You can find user IDs by forwarding their message to @userinfobot
yt_add_tg_invalid: Please send a valid numeric Telegram user ID.
yt_add_tg_not_found: This Telegram user has not started the bot. They must /start first.
yt_add_tg_dm_failed: Failed to send welcome DM via Telegram. Telegram contact not saved.
yt_add_dc_instruction: Send the YouTuber's Discord user ID (numeric). 💡 Enable Developer Mode in Discord, right-click user → Copy User ID
yt_add_dc_invalid: Please send a valid numeric Discord user ID.
yt_add_dc_not_found: This Discord user is not registered in the bot.
yt_add_dc_dm_failed: Failed to send welcome DM via Discord. YouTuber NOT added.
yt_add_need_one_contact: At least one contact (Telegram or Discord) is required!
yt_add_no_contact: ❌ At least one contact (Telegram or Discord) is required! YouTuber NOT added.
yt_add_dm_failed: ⚠️ YouTuber added but could not send welcome DM. Check contact info.
yt_add_fetched: 📡 Auto-fetched via YouTube Data API v3
premium_payment_activated: Your premium plan has been activated. Thank you for your purchase!

premium_expiry_warn_renew: Renew now to keep all your features!
premium_expired_grace_info: All members keep receiving gift codes during this period.

premium_expired_priority: Priority: First registered members stay active.
migrate_tip_2: Use all resources — they will be lost
migrate_tip_3: Check power limits with /transfer before moving
migrate_register_first: Use /register to register your account first

migrate_daily_range_info: Each day after eligibility, your range increases by ~4-5 states.
codeimage_hint: This sets the content image for a gift code on the website.
codeimage_send_photo: Send a photo now to set as the image for

star_bonus_hint: Connect your GitHub account with /github to earn extra register slots!
gform_already_exists_info: This form is already registered. Only the owner can re-add it.
dc_topic_giftcodes: 🎁 Gift code notifications from WosControl Bot
dc_topic_giftlog: 📊 Gift code & form submission logs from WosControl Bot
perm_warning_body: The bot does not have sufficient admin permissions in this group. Required permissions: • Manage Topics / Channels • Pin Messages • Delete Messages • Invite Users Please grant full admin permissions to the bot. Otherwise the bot will not function correctly and may leave the group.
perm_warning_urgent: 🚨 @everyone — The bot needs admin permissions to work! Please ask the group owner to grant full admin rights.
gform_tg_detected_body: {title} 🔗 Open Form 👤 Detected by: {detector} 🏰 Alliance: [{tag}] {alliance} 📊 Form Info {fields} fields · {pages} pages{uid_line}{expire_line} ⏳ Processing 👥 {count} members ({already} already submitted)
gform_tg_complete_body: {title} 🔗 Open Form 👤 Detected by: {detector} — Thank you! 🙏 🏰 Alliance: [{tag}] {alliance} 📊 Results {bar} {pct}% 👥 Total: {total} ✅ Success: {success} · ❌ Failed: {failed}
yt_add_tg_dm_failed_continue: ⚠️ Telegram not saved — you can continue with Discord.
